source_title: Ambig-DS: A Benchmark for Task-Framing Ambiguity in Data-Science Agents
timing_boundary: Both inspected dataset revisions predate immutable arXiv v1 by about four days and are plausible manuscript-time release evidence. The paper does not pin these revisions, so identity with the exact evaluated packages is not proven.
inspection_scope: Complete tracked snapshots of both official Hugging Face datasets were archived and inspected: 51 target task packages (prompts, manifests, evaluators, index) and 61 metric task packages (prompt pairs, metric manifest, single-judge verification records, index). Kaggle data, target build script, MLE-bench data/evaluators, experiment harness, trajectories, clarification-oracle implementation, diagnostic labels, scores, and result tables are not included in these releases and were not reconstructed.
license: CC-BY-NC-4.0 for released prompt/metadata packages; upstream Kaggle data and competition-specific terms apply separately.
